name: Pima Indians Diabetes Database
description: The dataset contains medical data from a females of at least 21 years old who have Pima Native American heritage, and the goal is to use this data to determine the diabetes mellitus status.

Pregnancies.description: The number of times the subject has been pregnant.

Plasma Glucose.description: The plasma glucose concentration after two hours, obtained using an oral glucose tolerance test.

Skin Thickness.description: Triceps skin fold thickness, measured in mm.

Insulin.description: Two-hour serum insulin level, measured in micro U/ml.

Diabetes.description: Whether the subject has been diagnosed with diabetes Mellitus.
